purpose: Public-safe sample data for a personal AI operation archive frontend. Use as reference only; production should render site-data/index.json.

rejectWhen: raw dump copied into display data

skillWorkflow: Use skills/archive-content-curator/SKILL.md to classify the source.
Rewrite into a beginner-readable public record.
Add evidence-backed literary, psychological, sociological, and philosophical layers.
Regenerate site-data and verify frontend routes.
Run structure, privacy, lint, and build gates before publishing.

modules.label: 藏馆
modules.goal: Display curated tools, sources, prompt patterns, and reference notes.

modules.label: 谱系
modules.goal: Display reproducible learning and build routes.

modules.label: 工坊
modules.goal: Display projects, prototypes, and operation stories with honest status.

modules.label: 年谱
modules.goal: Display growth, project, and system evolution over time.

modules.label: 手记
modules.goal: Display public devlogs, retrospectives, and lessons.

modules.label: 风信
modules.goal: Display short public updates and collected signals.

sampleWorks.title: Personal Archive / Obsidian Backend
sampleWorks.summary: A public/private Obsidian knowledge base rebuilt into raw sources, private compiled notes, public wiki pages, and frontend JSON.
operationStory: Archived the previous vault before rebuilding.
Separated raw material, private compiled knowledge, and public wiki.
Built validation scripts for structure, privacy, and public inventory.
replicationSteps: Create raw, private compiled, and public compiled layers.
Write privacy and structure checks before publishing.
Generate a public JSON payload for the frontend.
lessons: A frontend should not read raw notes directly.
Public display needs curated records, not mechanical migrations.
Validation gates are part of the product.
sampleWorks.nextPlan: Curate real works, feed, and journal items from the private queue.

sampleWorks.title: Agent Operating System Line
sampleWorks.summary: A long-running exploration of controller rules, skills, agent delegation, validation gates, and local runtime boundaries.
operationStory: Moved from single prompts to structured agent workflows.
Collected skills, rules, and validation patterns.
Learned that old rule files must be treated as historical unless promoted.
Separated one controller from bounded helpers to keep work auditable.
replicationSteps: Start with one controller agent and one repository.
Write task-specific skills or prompts only after repeated need appears.
Add validation commands before allowing publish or deploy.
Keep delegation bounded by ownership and output format.
lessons: More agents do not automatically improve work.
Rules need authority levels and retirement paths.
Outputs must be inspectable and reversible.
sampleWorks.nextPlan: Rewrite a public-safe article explaining the controller plus bounded delegation pattern.

sampleWorks.title: Campus AI Q&A / Competition System
sampleWorks.summary: A school-facing project line involving competition information, student-facing pages, and AI Q&A style workflows.
operationStory: Built or maintained school-facing frontend pages.
Explored external link confirmation, registration, and Q&A workflows.
replicationSteps: Add AI Q&A only after source boundaries are clear.
lessons: Student-facing tools need simple flows and clear source trust.
AI answers need source boundaries more than visual polish.
sampleWorks.nextPlan: Create a sanitized case-study card and remove local project details.

sampleWorks.title: Knowledge Capture Workflow
sampleWorks.summary: A workflow for collecting, triaging, rewriting, and publishing high-signal notes from local research and project work.
operationStory: Collected many raw notes and imported materials.
Discovered that raw import creates noise without curation.
Created review queues and public-safe promotion rules.
replicationSteps: Capture sources into an immutable area.
Classify each item by value and risk.
Rewrite useful items into compact public notes.
Generate frontend data only from reviewed notes.
lessons: The bottleneck is not collecting data; it is rewriting and review.
A public archive needs fewer, better records.
sampleWorks.nextPlan: Turn the workflow into a beginner route with screenshots and checkpoints.

samplePaths.title: Build A Public-Safe Obsidian Archive
samplePaths.summary: A beginner route for turning scattered notes into a publishable personal knowledge site.
samplePaths.finalOutput: A public JSON data layer and a frontend that does not expose private raw notes.

steps.title: Split layers
steps.goal: Separate raw material, private compilation, and public wiki.
steps.completion: No public page depends on raw local folders.

steps.title: Write schemas
steps.goal: Define frontmatter, status labels, source labels, and safety labels.
steps.completion: Every public item has title, summary, tags, status, sources, and safety.

steps.title: Generate data
steps.completion: Frontend can render without file system access.

steps.title: Validate
steps.goal: Run structure, privacy, inventory, lint, and build checks.
steps.completion: GitHub package is safe to share.

pitfalls: Using fake content to fill empty modules.

samplePaths.title: Replicate A Small Agent Workflow
samplePaths.summary: A route for copying the controller plus validation pattern without importing the full local setup.
samplePaths.finalOutput: One controller prompt, one task skill, one validation script, and one published case study.

steps.title: Choose one task
steps.goal: Avoid building a huge agent system first.
steps.completion: The workflow has one concrete repeated job.

steps.title: Define controller rules
steps.goal: Clarify input, output, boundaries, and stop conditions.
steps.completion: A new AI session can follow the rule without chat history.

steps.title: Add validation
steps.completion: There is at least one command or checklist that can fail.

steps.title: Write public case study
steps.goal: Explain what worked, what failed, and what to improve.
steps.completion: A beginner can copy the minimal pattern.

pitfalls: Adding many helper agents before defining the task.
Letting old rules override current project needs.
Publishing operational details that should stay local.

toolAgentInventory.name: Codex
toolAgentInventory.role: Primary coding and repository operation agent.
toolAgentInventory.learningValue: Shows how to turn a vague goal into files, scripts, validation, and public docs.
toolAgentInventory.replicationUse: Use as the controller for bounded coding tasks.

toolAgentInventory.name: Kimi
toolAgentInventory.role: Frontend collaborator and product interpretation assistant.
toolAgentInventory.learningValue: Useful when it receives a concrete product brief, data contract, and acceptance gates.
toolAgentInventory.replicationUse: Give Kimi this reference package before asking for frontend changes.

toolAgentInventory.name: Obsidian
toolAgentInventory.role: The source workspace for compiled public and private knowledge layers.
toolAgentInventory.replicationUse: Use markdown frontmatter and sources to create a maintainable personal wiki.

toolAgentInventory.name: Playwright / Browser Use
toolAgentInventory.role: Browser verification and visual workflow testing.
toolAgentInventory.learningValue: Makes frontend quality testable instead of opinion-only.
toolAgentInventory.replicationUse: Use after every major frontend change.

toolAgentInventory.name: MCP / ACP / Skills
toolAgentInventory.role: Capability extension and reusable agent workflow packaging.
toolAgentInventory.learningValue: Shows how local workflows become reusable instructions.
toolAgentInventory.replicationUse: Start with one skill per repeated task, not a large catalog.

promptPatterns.title: Frontend Product Brief
promptPatterns.intent: Ask an AI frontend builder to improve the archive using product context and data rules.
promptPatterns.whenToUse: Before frontend redesign, page implementation, or component cleanup.
promptPatterns.samplePrompt: Read the product reference and data contract first. Render site-data/index.json. Improve the archive frontend for beginners who want to learn and replicate the workflows. Do not expose sensitive values, raw chats, or local absolute paths.

promptPatterns.title: Project Card Rewrite
promptPatterns.intent: Convert a project note into a readable public work card.
promptPatterns.whenToUse: When filling works data from reviewed project candidates.
promptPatterns.samplePrompt: Rewrite this project note as a public work card. Keep purpose, operation steps, lessons, and replication route. Remove sensitive values and local absolute paths. Mark uncertain content as needs-redaction.

promptPatterns.title: Route Map Builder
promptPatterns.intent: Turn a project or tool cluster into a step-by-step learning path.
promptPatterns.whenToUse: When building paths pages or path detail pages.
promptPatterns.samplePrompt: Create a step-by-step learning route. Each step needs a goal, action, resource, pitfall, and completion check. Make it useful for a beginner.

operationTimeline.title: Rebuilt The Vault Into Public And Private Layers
operationTimeline.summary: The archive was reorganized into raw source, private compiled, public wiki, and frontend data layers.
operationTimeline.result: A GitHub-ready public layer with validation gates.
operationTimeline.lesson: Public display should be compiled and reviewed, not copied from raw notes.

operationTimeline.title: Created A Frontend Data Contract
operationTimeline.summary: The React frontend was prepared to consume site-data/index.json instead of reading Obsidian files.
operationTimeline.result: The frontend has a stable public data boundary but still needs better curated content.
operationTimeline.lesson: A beautiful frontend still looks weak when important modules have no curated records.

operationTimeline.title: Prepared A Kimi Reference Package
operationTimeline.summary: Created a public-safe product brief and sample data so Kimi can understand the desired frontend.
operationTimeline.result: Future frontend work has concrete context instead of vague visual instructions.
operationTimeline.lesson: AI frontend builders need product truth, data shape, and forbidden boundaries before design work.

frontendAcceptance: Use this JSON only as reference for richer missing modules.
All routes must work on desktop and mobile.
Empty works, feed, or journal modules must have clear empty states.
Project cards must show status and publicSafety.
Prompt patterns must be visible and copyable.
Operation timeline must show actions, tools, results, and lessons.
No local absolute paths or sensitive values in UI.
Lint and build should pass before handoff.
